name: Ruby Wisdom Drop #01 — Myth #1 — The Soft Pull
description:
The first video in the Royal Ruby Wisdom series. A 26-second correction of the most common credit myth in America. Checking your own credit does NOT hurt your score — it's a soft pull, invisible to lenders. Unlockable content: the full script, a one-page printable handout, and access to the Royal Ruby mailing list.

Educational content only. Not legal or financial advice.
